notes: Converts feet/inches to total inches. Context guards try to avoid shoe/clothing size ranges.
Requires explicit height label.
Limited support for word-form feet. Currently only handles five plus numeric inches.
Requires pounds/lbs/# unit or nearby weight/weigh wording.
Fallback only if height was already extracted. Captures a nearby 2-3 digit number as weight.
Requires waist label before or after value.
Requires hip/hips label before or after value.
Use capture group 1 from bust-waist-hips clusters when context contains measurement, bust, waist, or hip.
Use capture group 1 from bust-waist-hips clusters when context contains measurement, bust, waist, or hip.
Use capture group 1 from bust-waist-hips clusters when context contains measurement, bust, waist, or hip.
Requires explicit inseam text. Does not infer from tall/petite/length.
Requires age context.
Captures bra band only. Skip product Size: contexts unless bra/bust/chest context is nearby.
Captures cup only. Skip product Size: contexts unless bra/bust/chest context is nearby.
Captures bust/chest measurement without cup size.
Captures only the weight from a height, weight, cup cluster. Validate plausible body-weight range, for example 70-400.
Captures only the cup size from a height, weight, cup cluster. Do not populate bust_in_number_display unless a band/bust number is present.
Negative/exclusion pattern. Do not treat weight-change phrases like lost 70 lbs or down 20 pounds as current body weight.
Use when a likely body weight appears immediately before a height expression. Validate captured weight is in a plausible body-weight range, for example 70-400.
Use when a likely body weight appears immediately after a height expression without lbs/pounds. Validate captured weight is in a plausible body-weight range, for example 70-400.
Use when a reviewer uses a double quote as the feet marker instead of the inches marker. Validate feet/inches ranges before accepting.
Captures only the bra band from compact bra-size / waist / hips clusters.
Captures only the cup size from compact bra-size / waist / hips clusters.
Captures only the waist value from compact bra-size / waist / hips clusters.
Captures only the hips value from compact bra-size / waist / hips clusters.
Use when reviewer gives cup letter without a bra band or bust number. Do not populate bust_in_number_display from this pattern.
Captures only bust from a measurements cluster where the middle value is a waist range.
Captures only the waist range as raw text. Do not populate waist_in because it requires a single numeric value.
Captures only hips from a measurements cluster where the middle value is a waist range.
Use when quote characters appear doubled in the stored review text, e.g. from CSV or spreadsheet escaping.
Use when a reviewer writes height as feet comma inches, usually near a body-weight value. Validate inches are 0-11 before accepting.
Use when a likely body weight appears before a height expression joined by & or and. Validate captured weight is in a plausible body-weight range, for example 70-400.
Use when reviewer writes height as feet.inches immediately before a body-weight value. Interpret 5.5 as 5 feet 5 inches, not 5.5 feet; validate inches are 0-11.
Use when reviewer writes fractional inches without a space, e.g. 5'41/2 meaning 5 feet 4 1/2 inches. Capture groups are feet, whole inches, numerator, denominator; validate inches are 0-11.
Use for compact bust-waist-hips clusters. This row captures only the first number.
Use for compact bust-waist-hips clusters. This row captures only the middle number.
Use for compact bust-waist-hips clusters. This row captures only the final number.
Use when reviewer says weigh plus a plausible body-weight number but omits lbs/pounds.
Use only when compact height shorthand follows an explicit weigh phrase, e.g. I weigh 202 I'm 51. This avoids reading ages like I'm 44 as height.
Use when reviewer puts a period between ft and inches, e.g. 5ft.3in.
Use for high-waist / low-hips paired measurements. This row captures only waist.
Use for high-waist / low-hips paired measurements. This row captures only hips.
Use when reviewer writes a bust number before the bust label, with or without inch marks.
Use for labeled waist fractions. Capture groups are whole number, numerator, denominator.
Use when reviewer writes cup letter after the word cup and before bra.
Use for reversed bra notation like D36 in bra. This row captures only cup size.
Use for reversed bra notation like D36 in bra. This row captures only band/bust number.
Use for explicit phrase waist measurement of N inches.

example_input: My bust is about 38", waist 34", hips 44"
notes: Use when reviewer labels bust before an approximate number, e.g. bust is about 38.
